> Aether Terminal is alpha / not release-ready. Bug reports that include exact
> reproduction steps and machine-checked evidence are the most actionable.

## What happened

A clear description of the bug.

## Expected behavior

What you expected to happen instead.

## Evidence

If a verifier or gate is involved, paste the command you ran and the relevant
artifact (e.g. `pnpm verify:release:hygiene`). Redact tokens, absolute paths,
and credentials.
